calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-16-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANTS ALFREDO HERRERA AND CANDY ESPINOZA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 5 days leave to amend. Plaintiff has not responded to the arguments raised by defendant. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =(301/PJB)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-08-2011 Continued To Jun-16-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Alfredo Lopez Herrera, 415-728-4649, defendant and moving party appearing propria persona
James Watson, Esq, 415-585-2552 for plaintiff and opposing party JP Morgan Chase Bank

RULING:
NOT ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT ALFREDO HERRERA, CANDY ESPINOZA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO 6/16/11 FOR PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE DEPT 301 WITH COURTESY COPIES OF ITS LATE FILED OPPOSITION NO LATER THAN 6/9/11 AND FOR DEFENDANT TO FILE A REPLY IF ANY, TO THAT OPPOSITION NO LATER THAN 6/10/11 WITH COURTESY COPIES OF ANY REPLY PROVIDED TO DEPT. 301. COURTESY COPIES TO REFLECT NEW HEARING DATE. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol Karen CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
